text: Trump says he's paused U.S. effort to guide stranded vessels out of Strait of Hormuz - NPR
fullText: President Trump says that he is pausing the U.S. effort to guide stranded vessels out of the Strait of Hormuz to finalize an Iran deal, but that the American forces' blockade of the Iranian ports would remain in place.
